refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet or exceed the customer-defined cycle time target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-functions for each phase allows targeted design parameters and implementation focus, improving manageability and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for each phase (load, travel, dump) under representative duty cycles and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

candidate_dps: DP1: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for each cycle phase
DP2: Implement teleoperation assistance to reduce operator delays
DP3: Integrate safety services to minimize safety-related cycle interruptions
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Optimize vehicle mechanical and control systems for each cycle phase

potential_sources: Interdependence between vehicle control and teleoperation modules
Safety services may impose constraints affecting cycle time
coupling_check.notes: DP1 focuses on vehicle optimization, which can be modularized with well-defined interfaces to teleoperation and safety services, minimizing coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle mechanical and control improvements can achieve cycle time targets independently.
Risk that teleoperation delays or safety interventions may impact cycle time despite vehicle optimization.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating teleoperation and safety service DPs in subsequent decomposition levels to address residual cycle time impacts.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and control systems responsible for load, travel, and dump cycle phases.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends operational data to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives commands from Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Bidirectional safety status and alerts exchanged with Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module fully contains the DP logic for cycle time optimization with minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution module interfaces with Vehicle but does not contain core DP logic.
Teleoperation module has limited containment; mostly interface interactions.
Safety Services module mainly monitors and intervenes; low containment of DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Vehicle module centralizes cycle time optimization logic, reducing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overlap with Teleoperation commands affecting cycle time.
Safety interventions may require cross-module coordination.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor cross-module interactions and consider interface refinement to mitigate diffusion risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-functions; selected DP logically addresses the primary vehicle-related optimization.

diffusion_risks: Teleoperation and Safety Services modules may indirectly affect cycle time, requiring careful interface management.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment of DP1 with minimal diffusion, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times on Vehicle module outputs and cross-checking with telemetry and safety alerts.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of DP1 to Vehicle module is clear and aligns with physical and control system responsibilities.

recommended_revisions: Plan subsequent decomposition to address teleoperation and safety impacts on cycle time.
Refine interfaces to reduce diffusion and improve coordination.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, the high safety criticality and potential cross-module impacts warrant further refinement of FRs and DPs to explicitly include teleoperation and safety influences on cycle time.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize load phase cycle time
FR2: Minimize travel phase cycle time
FR3: Minimize dump phase cycle time

revise.why: To explicitly incorporate teleoperation and safety service influences on cycle time and reduce cross-module diffusion risks.

assumptions: Vehicle optimization can achieve majority of cycle time improvements.
Teleoperation and safety services impact cycle time but are secondary at this level.
open_risks: Cross-module coordination may introduce delays affecting cycle time.
Safety interventions could conflict with cycle time optimization.
evidence_needed: Empirical data on teleoperation and safety impact on cycle time.
Interface performance metrics between Vehicle, Teleoperation, and Safety Services.
